name: labflow
description: Codex-native scientific research workflow plugin with Obsidian-backed memory, research prompts, background agents, and MCP configuration.

interface.shortDescription: Codex workflows for research coding with Obsidian memory
interface.longDescription: Labflow brings Codex-native scientific research workflows into a project: Obsidian-backed context and progress handoff, research-friendly annotation and pseudocode skills, PDF reading workflows, prompt-forging sessions, and background exploration/research agents.
defaultPrompt: Start a Lab research coding session from this project.
Open LabPrompt and turn my rough idea into a Codex prompt.
Refresh the Obsidian handoff for this research project.
